mission.title: n8n: Vertex AI exceptions masked by n8n exception
mission.description: Vertex AI exceptions masked by n8n exception. Community-requested feature.

steps.title: Check current n8n deployment
steps.description:
Verify your n8n version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n n8n -l app.kubernetes.io/name=n8n
helm list -n n8n 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working n8n installation.

steps.title: Review n8n configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant n8n configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n n8n -l app.kubernetes.io/name=n8n
kubectl get configmap -n n8n -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=n8n
```
### Bug Description

When using Vertex AI models in LLM nodes or LangChain Code nodes, exceptions from LangChain/Vertex AI are masked by n8n's exception handler.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Vertex AI exceptions masked by n8n exception
Upgrade n8n to include the fix
steps.description:
If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade n8n:
```bash
helm repo update
helm upgrade n8n n8n/n8n --namespace n8n
```
Verify the upgrade:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n n8n
helm list -n n8n
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n n8n -l app.kubernetes.io/name=n8n
kubectl get events -n n8n --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Vertex AI exceptions masked by n8n exception" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
## Summary

There was an issue with the version of `/google-vertexai` that was in use (0.2.13) causing errors to be converted to `Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'Symbol(Symbol.asyncIterator)')` due to an issue with an older version of gaxios - the latest version of the library has this problem resolved.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with n8n installed or the issue environment reproducible.
